today.case: Walk me through today's NQ read in two s
today.reply: The candles are nested and not stepping, which is a sideways read - her rule is to trade the edges, not the middle, until a break resolves the range. The 30-minute SMA gate is not aligned (50 and 200 both falling but price not clearly below both in a clean stack), so her standing instruction is to s
